nasb.text: And it came about when the Lord was about to take up Elijah by a whirlwind to heaven, that Elijah went with Elisha from Gilgal.

esv.text: Now when the Lord was about to take Elijah up to heaven by a whirlwind, Elijah and Elisha were on their way from Gilgal.

cnv.text: 耶和華將要用旋風接以利亞往天上去的時候，以利亞和以利沙一起離開吉甲。

ccb.text: 耶和华用旋风接以利亚升天之前，以利亚和以利沙正在离开吉甲的路上。
